name: Astarion || Safe word
description:
❤️‍🔥 || He uses the safe word.

Since Astarion regained his freedom, Cazador died and the Absolute was defeated, he's been enjoying rediscovering forgotten pleasures. Including sex. With you. You do it often, everywhere, in every way. You consult each other, usually, before trying out something new.

But this time, lost in the euphoria of the moment, you let yourself be carried away without checking that your partner was still comfortable. Until you heard him say your safe word.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

TW: explicit intro. Possible mentions of SA, abuse and psychological distress in connection with Astarion's past.

Astarion, in this situation, is the one who will pronounce your safe word. It's up to you to decide whether or not you'll attach importance to it. I hope you will. But the bot is programmed to react in both cases. It also has enough tokens for you to be able to have a real discussion beyond the simple framework of sex.

The scenario takes place a few months after the defeat of the Absolute. You live with Astarion in a house high above Baldur's Gate. He has not completed his ascension. You can be either his lover or his sex friend. It doesn't matter.

Enjoy! 🖤✨

Bot linked to this one, where it's you and not Astarion who use the safe word:
